name: codex-goalctl
description: Opinionated Codex skill for an orchestrator workflow using the neutral codex-goalctl CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Manage subagent goals from a main thread.
interface.longDescription: Codex Goalctl teaches an opinionated main-thread orchestrator workflow for assigning, updating, inspecting, and clearing Codex thread goals through the neutral codex-goalctl host command.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $codex-goalctl to assign a fresh goal to a Codex subagent.
